title: Site Engineer
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We are seeking a dedicated Site Engineer to oversee the design, planning, and execution of structural and civil engineering projects. The role requires strong project management skills, technical expertise in structural analysis, and the ability to manage resources effectively to ensure safe and timely project delivery.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and manage project plans, schedules, and budgets using MS Project.
  • Conduct structural analysis and design using STAAD Pro, Tekla Structures, and AutoCAD.
  • Utilize Revit and Navisworks for 3D modeling, BIM coordination, and clash detection.
  • Manage tendering, contract administration, and cost estimation processes.
  • Perform quantity surveying including BOQ preparation and resource allocation.
  • Oversee construction management activities including steel structural works, pipeline design, and site supervision.
  • Monitor compliance with regulatory standards and workplace safety requirements.
  • Collaborate with consultants, contractors, and internal teams to ensure smooth project execution.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Civil/Structural Engineering or equivalent.
  • Proven experience as a Structural Engineer and Quantity Surveyor in the construction industry.
  • Proficiency in:
    STAAD Pro | Revit | Navisworks | Tekla Structures | AutoCAD | MS Project
  • Strong knowledge in:
    Structural Analysis & Design, Quantity Surveying, Construction Management, Steel Structural Works, Designing, Tendering & Contracts Management
  • Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and deliver within deadlines.

We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3-5 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.

UDYOGAH PTE LTD | 20C0055 | Arasu R1102109

hiringCompany.description:
JD Builders Pte Ltd was founded in mid-2021 and has since been actively involved in the tendering and construction of various temporary facilities, including site offices, worker dormitories, and other auxiliary structures.
At JD Builders, we are dedicated to providing innovative and practical design solutions for our clients. We continuously seek to optimize our resources and refine our processes to ensure that we meet project budgets and requirements effectively.

Our portfolio also includes temporary container offices, dormitories, warehouses, shelters, canteens, and on-site facilities. In addition to these structures, we have successfully completed numerous Site Offices, Dormitory, hoarding, fencing, drainage, road opening, and general earthing projects. We rely on a trusted network of subcontractors to contribute to the successful completion of our projects and ensure client satisfaction.

We prioritize the well-being of our staff and recognize the importance of work-life balance. To foster a positive work environment, we organize events and activities that encourage employee engagement and family involvement. We remain committed to building strong relationships, maintaining a robust resource base, and embarking on a prosperous journey together.
hiringCompany.name: JD BUILDERS PTE. LTD.
